query:
SELECT COUNT(*) as "n!: i64" FROM blocks b
           WHERE b.id IN (?, ?)
             AND b.deleted_at IS NULL
             AND b.is_conflict = 0
             AND EXISTS (
                 SELECT 1 FROM block_properties p
                 WHERE p.block_id = b.id
                   AND p.key = 'is_space'
                   AND p.value_text = 'true'
             )
